PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOMBS, RICHARD COOMBS, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'MEARA, BRIAN RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE & SEDAN $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- PLAINTIFF RICHARD COOMBS TO HAVE $3500 AND PLAINTIFF NANACY COOMBS TO HAVE $1000. COSTS OF SUIT TO PLAINTIFFS. $315.50 COSTS FOR NANCY COOMBS; $293.50 FOR RICHARD COOMB
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TAKE NOTHING FROM CROSS DEFENDANT COOMBS, RICHARD COOMBS, NANCY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOMBS, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT O'MEARA, BRIAN RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE & SEDAN
